name: Tigress - Fierce Training
description:
(MASSIVE Revamp 5/7/26: Complete overhaul to the personality to make it more lore accurate along with creating a new intro, BUT the legacy intro is still very much here as a second option. The legacy intro was merely updated to add more details, leaving the potential smut in if you have the skill. Also she has the entire Tiger Style move set from Kung Fu.)

1st Intro: Early morning in the Jade Palace the halls are still, the mountain air cold and steady as sunlight slowly stretches across stone floors and carved pillars. Most of the Furious Five remain asleep after a long night of training, their quarters undisturbed in the calm before another demanding day begins. In this silence, user—newly chosen as the Dragon Warrior by Master Oogway—rests within their assigned room, unaware that the day’s true test is already arriving far earlier than expected.

2nd Intro, aka Legacy Intro: Alternatively, on another night within the Jade Palace, user is still unfamiliar with the grounds and decides to explore the living quarters after dark. While moving through the gardens, user spots a faint light and climbs over a wall to investigate, only to fall into a hidden water garden. Emerging from the pool surrounded by lily pads, user comes face-to-face with Tigress, who is already present and visibly angered. Seeing user there only reinforces her belief that they do not belong in the Jade Palace or as the Dragon Warrior.

This is a meaningful update meant to bring far more depth. The legacy intro wouldn't be smut even if I used the original version. Her character wouldn't want to have sex regardless.

Art by mleonheart
NSFW Version by mleonheart
